onboarding.title: Welcome to MeoNote
onboarding.subtitle: Your AI-powered voice note assistant
onboarding.consent: I agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
onboarding.consentRequired: Please accept the terms to continue

home.title: MeoNote
home.noNotesHint: Tap the record button to create your first note
home.offline: You are offline. Showing cached notes.
home.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this note?

recording.tooShortMessage: Please record for at least 10 seconds.
recording.permissionDeniedMessage: Please allow microphone access in Settings to record.
recording.cancelConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this recording?
recording.phoneCallWarning: Recording paused due to incoming call
recording.lowStorage: Low storage warning — recording may stop soon
recording.noAudioDetected: No audio detected — check your microphone input in system settings

detail.retrySuccess: Retry successful! Your note is being processed.
detail.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this note? This action cannot be undone.

settings.title: Settings
settings.clearDataConfirmMessage: This will delete all your notes and reset the app. This action cannot be undone.

error.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection.
